# Do Studio
> Do Studio is a digital marketing and branding agency headquartered in Calicut (Kozhikode), Kerala, serving businesses across Kerala, Bangalore, and India. Specializing in SEO, performance marketing, social media, web development, branding, package design, print design, and creative production since 2018.

Do Studio provides end-to-end digital marketing and creative services for businesses across healthcare, education, retail, ecommerce, manufacturing, interior design, hospitality, and professional services.

## Important Pages
- [Homepage](https://dostudio.co.in/) : Agency overview, services, portfolio, and contact.
- [Services](https://dostudio.co.in/services/) : All marketing, branding, and creative services.
- [Our Works](https://dostudio.co.in/our-works/) : Portfolio across branding, web, design, and production.
- [Contact Us](https://dostudio.co.in/contact/) : Office address, WhatsApp, and free consultation.

## Calicut Services (Primary Location)
- [Branding Agency in Calicut](https://dostudio.co.in/services/branding-agency-in-calicut/) : Brand strategy, logo design, and visual identity.
- [Digital Marketing Agency in Calicut](https://dostudio.co.in/services/digital-marketing-agency-in-calicut/) : SEO, social media, content, and performance marketing.
- [Web Development Company in Calicut](https://dostudio.co.in/services/web-development-company-in-calicut/) : Custom web design, WordPress, React.js, and e-commerce.
- [SEO Company in Calicut](https://dostudio.co.in/seo-company-in-calicut/) : Technical SEO, local SEO, on-page, off-page, and content optimization.

## Bangalore Services (Landing Pages)
- [Digital Marketing Agency in Bangalore](https://dostudio.co.in/digital-marketing-agency-in-bangalore/) : Full-funnel SEO, Google Ads, and social media for Bangalore businesses.
- [SEO Company in Bangalore](https://dostudio.co.in/seo-company-in-bangalore/) : Technical SEO, content, and backlink services for Bangalore businesses.
- [Social Media Marketing Agency in Bangalore](https://dostudio.co.in/social-media-marketing-agency-in-bangalore/) : Social media management, paid campaigns, and content creation.
- [Web Development Company in Bangalore](https://dostudio.co.in/web-development-company-in-bangalore/) : Website development with UX, speed optimization, and CMS.
- [Branding Agency in Bangalore](https://dostudio.co.in/branding-agency-in-bangalore/) : Brand identity, visual design, and brand strategy for Bangalore brands.
- [Video Production Company in Bangalore](https://dostudio.co.in/video-production-company-in-bangalore/) : Corporate videos, promotional films, explainer videos, and post-production.

## Portfolio
- [Branding Works](https://dostudio.co.in/our-works/branding/) : Logo design, brand strategy, and visual identity projects.
- [Creative Posters](https://dostudio.co.in/our-works/creative-posters/) : Social media creatives and campaign visuals.
- [Motion Creatives](https://dostudio.co.in/our-works/motion-creatives/) : Motion graphics and animated content.
- [Web Design](https://dostudio.co.in/our-works/web-design/) : Website design and development showcase.
- [Package Design](https://dostudio.co.in/our-works/package-design/) : Product packaging design projects.
- [Print Design](https://dostudio.co.in/our-works/print-design/) : Brochures, flyers, and print marketing materials.
- [Production](https://dostudio.co.in/our-works/production/) : Photo and video production for brands.

## Core Expertise
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
- Technical SEO
- Local SEO
- Content Marketing
- Social Media Marketing
- Performance Marketing
- Google Ads / PPC Advertising
- Website Design and Development
- WordPress Development
- React.js Web Applications
- E-commerce Development
- Branding and Brand Identity
- Logo Design
- Package Design
- Print Design
- Video Production
- Creative Production
- Product Photography

## Industries Served
- Healthcare
- Education
- Retail
- E-commerce
- Manufacturing
- Interior Design
- Hospitality
- Professional Services

## Locations
- Calicut (Kozhikode), Kerala — Primary office: 1st Floor, Ramaswami Complex, Cherooty Rd, Kozhikode, Kerala 673001
- Bangalore, Karnataka — Service landing pages and remote client servicing
- Kerala (statewide)
- India (nationwide)
